---
title: "Ideas Matter in Inter-Korean Relations: Shifts in South Korea’s Foreign Policy Interests and Behavior vis-à-vis North Korea"
date: 2021-07
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
  - name: Yuree Kim
    url: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Yuree-Kim-2
    orcid: 0000
    affiliation: Vietnam National University
categories: [international relations, Korea, inter-Korean, foreign policy, 2021]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> and Yuree Kim (2021), “Ideas Matter in Inter-Korean Relations: Shifts in South Korea’s Foreign Policy Interests and Behavior vis-à-vis North Korea,” in Mason Richey, Jagannath P. Panda and David A. Tizzard (eds.) <em>The Future of the Korean Peninsula: Korea 2032 and Beyond</em> (pp. 32-58), Routledge <a href="https://www.taylorfrancis.com/chapters/edit/10.4324/9781003148890-2/ideas-matter-inter-korean-relations-kadir-jun-ayhan-yuree-kim"><code>link</code></a>
#image:
#draft: true
---

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{ayhan_ideas_2021,
    location = {Singapore},
    title = {Ideas Matter in Inter-Korean Relations: Shifts in South Korea’s Foreign Policy Interests and Behavior Vis-à-Vis North Korea},
    url = {https://www.taylorfrancis.com/chapters/edit/10.4324/9781003148890-2/ideas-matter-inter-korean-relations-kadir-jun-ayhan-yuree-kim},
    pages = {32--58},
    booktitle = {The Future of the Korean Peninsula Korea 2032 and Beyond},
    publisher = {Routledge},
    author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun and Kim, Yuree},
    editor = {Richey, Mason and Panda, Jagannath P. and Tizzard, David A.},
    date = {2021},
    note = {Type: Book Section},
}
```
